python.code:
# Python (Tkinter GUI)
import tkinter as tk
root = tk.Tk()
frame = tk.Frame(root)
frame.pack()
for i in range(3):
    tk.Label(frame, text=f'Item {i+1}').pack(side='left', padx=5)

comparisons.explanation: CSS Flexbox is for web layout only. The CONCEPT of flexible layout is universal; the implementation is platform-specific.

keyInsight: CSS Flexbox and Grid are WEB-SPECIFIC. But the CONCEPT of flexible layouts exists everywhere — Flutter has Flex widgets, Android has LinearLayout, iOS has StackView.
